content:
Figure 1. A significant number of these are located on or close to prospective north to north easterly trending structures. 
 
RC Drilling is recommended at Emily Wells, Antipodean, Maralinga Downs and Warribrook.
 
Auger sampling, which is amenable to the shallow regolith, has identified new drilling targets and should be applied in a regional and
systematic fashion throughout the tenement package.
